International.name: April Fools' Day
International.description: April Fools' Day is celebrated on April 1st each year. It is a day when people play practical jokes and hoaxes on each other. The jokes and their victims are called 'April fools'. The day is marked by the commission of harmless pranks, such as putting salt in the sugar bowl or setting an alarm clock to go off at an unusual time. The tradition of April Fools' Day is believed to have originated in France in the 16th century, but it is now celebrated in many countries around the world.
